# [[Defaults]]
set(THIRDPARTY_CJSON_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ON)

set(CJSON_OVERRIDE_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
if(THIRDPARTY_CJSON_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
    set(CJSON_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
else()
    set(CJSON_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
endif()


# [[Subdirectories]]
add_subdirectory(cJSON EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)


# [[Binaries]]
eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "cJSON"
    MODULE_TYPE INTERFACE
    MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/cJSON"
)


# [[Dependencies]]
eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "cJSON" DEPENDENCY_NAME "cjson")
